cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(zhinst_seqc LANGUAGES C CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

# --- Flex/Bison ---
find_package(FLEX REQUIRED)
find_package(BISON REQUIRED)

# ASM parser/lexer (auto-regenerated by cmake)
BISON_TARGET(asm_parser
    src/asm_parser.y
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/asm_parser.tab.c
    DEFINES_FILE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/asm_parser.tab.h
)

FLEX_TARGET(asm_lexer
    src/asm_lexer.l
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/asm_lexer.yy.c
)

ADD_FLEX_BISON_DEPENDENCY(asm_lexer asm_parser)

# SeqC parser/lexer
#
# NOTE: NOT auto-regenerated by cmake. The bison LR tables for seqc_parser.y
# are sensitive to the exact bison version — bison 3.8.2 on this system
# generates 232 states (unreachable nonterminal stripped) while the original
# binary was compiled with tables that match 233 states. Re-running bison
# produces subtly wrong parse behavior (many tests regress to near-empty AST).
#
# The pre-generated src/seqc_parser.tab.c, src/seqc_parser.tab.h, and
# src/seqc_lexer.c are checked into git as the known-good artifacts.
# Regenerate ONLY when making intentional grammar changes, and verify with
# the full test suite (python tests/diff_test.py) before committing.
#
# Manual regeneration:
#   cd reconstructed/src
#   bison -o seqc_parser.tab.c --header=seqc_parser.tab.h seqc_parser.y
#   flex -o seqc_lexer.c seqc_lexer.l
set(SEQC_PARSER_SOURCES
    src/seqc_parser.tab.c
    src/seqc_lexer.c
)

# Force generated .c files to compile as C++ (they #include C++ headers)
set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/asm_parser.tab.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/asm_lexer.yy.c
    ${SEQC_PARSER_SOURCES}
    PROPERTIES LANGUAGE CXX
)

# --- Sources ---
# Collect all .cpp files recursively under src/ (subdirectory layout).
file(GLOB_RECURSE ZHINST_SEQC_SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS src/*.cpp)

# --- libc++ PRNG shim ---
# prng_libcxx.cpp implements the binary's runtime PRNG behavior:
#   - WaveformGenerator::rand uses a Park-Miller MINSTD LCG + custom
#     Marsaglia polar Box-Muller (portable C++, no stdlib PRNG).
#   - WaveformGenerator::randomGauss / ::randomUniform use libc++
#     mt19937_64 + normal_distribution / uniform_real_distribution.
# Because libc++ and libstdc++ disagree on Box-Muller pair order in
# normal_distribution, the TU MUST be compiled with -stdlib=libc++ to
# match the binary byte-for-byte. When clang++ is available we build
# this single TU with libc++ (symbols inline as weak — no libc++.so
# runtime dep). Otherwise it falls through to the default compiler
# (in which case `randomGauss` and `randomUniform` differential tests
# will fail; `rand` will still work because MINSTD is portable).
find_program(CLANGXX_EXECUTABLE clang++)
if(CLANGXX_EXECUTABLE AND NOT CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    # Using g++ (or other) for the bulk; force clang++ with libc++
    # for the shim TU only. Symbols inline as weak so no libc++.so dep.
    set(PRNG_SHIM ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/infra/prng_libcxx.cpp)
    list(REMOVE_ITEM ZHINST_SEQC_SOURCES ${PRNG_SHIM})
    set(PRNG_SHIM_OBJ ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/prng_libcxx.o)
    add_custom_command(
        OUTPUT ${PRNG_SHIM_OBJ}
        COMMAND ${CLANGXX_EXECUTABLE} -stdlib=libc++ -fPIC -O2
                -std=c++17 -fvisibility=hidden
                -c ${PRNG_SHIM} -o ${PRNG_SHIM_OBJ}
        DEPENDS ${PRNG_SHIM}
        COMMENT "Building PRNG shim with libc++ (clang++)"
        VERBATIM
    )
    add_custom_target(prng_libcxx_obj DEPENDS ${PRNG_SHIM_OBJ})
    set(PRNG_SHIM_OBJECTS ${PRNG_SHIM_OBJ})
else()
    set(PRNG_SHIM_OBJECTS "")
endif()

add_library(zhinst_seqc STATIC
    ${ZHINST_SEQC_SOURCES}
    ${SEQC_PARSER_SOURCES}
    ${BISON_asm_parser_OUTPUTS}
    ${FLEX_asm_lexer_OUTPUTS}
    ${PRNG_SHIM_OBJECTS}
)

if(PRNG_SHIM_OBJECTS)
    add_dependencies(zhinst_seqc prng_libcxx_obj)
    set_source_files_properties(${PRNG_SHIM_OBJECTS}
        PROPERTIES EXTERNAL_OBJECT TRUE GENERATED TRUE)
endif()

target_include_directories(zhinst_seqc PUBLIC include)

# Generated bison/flex headers (asm_parser.tab.h) need to be findable
target_include_directories(zhinst_seqc PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})

# --- Boost ---
find_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS filesystem json log serialization)
target_link_libraries(zhinst_seqc PUBLIC Boost::filesystem Boost::json Boost::log Boost::serialization)
# Match the system Boost.Log ABI tag (v2_mt_posix vs v2s_mt_posix)
target_compile_definitions(zhinst_seqc PUBLIC BOOST_LOG_WITHOUT_SYSLOG)

# --- pybind11 (header-only, for type-checking the Python binding layer) ---
find_package(pybind11 QUIET CONFIG)
find_package(Python3 QUIET COMPONENTS Development.Module)
if(pybind11_FOUND AND Python3_FOUND)
    message(STATUS "Found pybind11 ${pybind11_VERSION} + Python ${Python3_VERSION}")
    target_link_libraries(zhinst_seqc PUBLIC pybind11::headers)
    target_include_directories(zhinst_seqc PRIVATE ${Python3_INCLUDE_DIRS})
    target_compile_definitions(zhinst_seqc PRIVATE ZHINST_HAS_PYBIND11=1)
else()
    message(STATUS "pybind11 not found — Python binding sources will not type-check")
endif()

# --- pybind11 loadable module (for differential testing) ---
# Builds _seqc_compiler.so from the reconstructed static archive.
# Requires PIC + global-dynamic TLS on the static lib so it can be
# linked into a shared object.
if(pybind11_FOUND AND Python3_FOUND)
    # The static lib must be PIC-compatible and use global-dynamic TLS
    # (not local-exec) for thread_local variables.
    set_target_properties(zhinst_seqc PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
    target_compile_options(zhinst_seqc PRIVATE -ftls-model=global-dynamic)

    file(WRITE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/_module_shim.cpp
         "// empty — all symbols come from the static archive\n")
    python3_add_library(_seqc_compiler MODULE
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/_module_shim.cpp)
    target_link_libraries(_seqc_compiler PRIVATE
        -Wl,--whole-archive zhinst_seqc -Wl,--no-whole-archive)
    # Allow undefined symbols — many reconstructed stubs are not yet implemented.
    # They'll only crash if actually called at runtime.
    target_link_options(_seqc_compiler PRIVATE -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined)
    target_link_libraries(_seqc_compiler PRIVATE
        Boost::filesystem Boost::json Boost::log pybind11::headers z)
    set_target_properties(_seqc_compiler PROPERTIES PREFIX "" SUFFIX ".so")
    message(STATUS "Building _seqc_compiler Python module for testing")
endif()

# --- ELFIO ---
# Try CMake config first (conan, vcpkg, system install with cmake files).
# Fall back to searching for the header directly.
find_package(elfio QUIET CONFIG)
if(elfio_FOUND)
    target_link_libraries(zhinst_seqc PUBLIC elfio::elfio)
else()
    find_path(ELFIO_INCLUDE_DIR elfio/elfio.hpp
        HINTS /usr/include /usr/local/include
    )
    if(ELFIO_INCLUDE_DIR)
        message(STATUS "Found ELFIO headers at ${ELFIO_INCLUDE_DIR}")
        target_include_directories(zhinst_seqc SYSTEM PUBLIC ${ELFIO_INCLUDE_DIR})
    else()
        message(FATAL_ERROR
            "Could not find ELFIO. Install it or set ELFIO_INCLUDE_DIR.")
    endif()
endif()
